component.name: SDDM Variant Manager
component.summary: Browse, preview, and install SDDM login themes without logging out

description.p: SDDM Variant Manager is for anyone who uses SDDM — Hyprland, Plasma, or another desktop — and wants to rice the login screen without logging out every time to test a theme.

It lists all installed SDDM themes, supports multi-variant collections in a Themes/ folder, installs public themes from GitHub, and runs the real greeter in test mode so video and animated backgrounds preview faithfully (unlike static thumbnails in KDE settings alone).

Install public themes from GitHub, preview backgrounds, apply variants, and test the full SDDM greeter with sddm-greeter or sddm-greeter-qt6. Close the full preview with Alt+Tab and the in-app Close preview button.
